title: augmanitai-portal: AUGMANITAI Research Programme Portal
description: Public portal repository for the AUGMANITAI Research Programme. Aggregates entry points to the terminology corpus, periodic table of terms, atlas pages, and programme metadata.
access_conditions: Access restricted. Contact author via ORCID record (0009-0006-3773-7796) with documented research purpose.
notes: This .zenodo.json provides machine-readable metadata for crawlers (Software Heritage, OpenAIRE, DataCite). The GitHub-Zenodo auto-DOI integration is intentionally NOT enabled by the author; all canonical Zenodo records remain restricted-access. Contact author via ORCID for documented research access.
